welcome_message: 👋 Welcome to Tabadex! We are happy you've joined the world of smart digital asset exchange. What can you do here? 🔹 Quickly swap digital assets (e.g., BTC to USDT). 🔹 No registration or identity verification needed. 🔹 Secure and fully automated transfers via the bot. 🔹 View your order status and transaction history. Everything is designed to be simple, fast, and transparent, so you can complete your swap in just a few clicks. To get started, choose one of the options below: 👇
buy_tether_wip: This feature is currently under development. 🚧
error_occurred: An error occurred. Please try again later. If the problem persists, contact support.
exchange_select_from_currency: Which currency do you want to sell?
exchange_select_to_currency: Which currency do you want to buy?
exchange_enter_recipient_address: Please enter your destination wallet address to receive {to_currency}.
exchange_fetching_final_rate: ⏳ Fetching the final exchange rate... Please wait.
exchange_deposit_info:
✅ Your transaction has been successfully created!

To complete the process, please send the **exact** amount to the specified address:

💰 **Amount to Deposit:**
`{amount}` {from_currency}

📍 **Deposit Address:**
`{deposit_address}`

 Your transaction ID for tracking: `{tx_id}`

**Note:** This address is valid only for this transaction. The bot will automatically track the status after your deposit.
exchange_canceled: The exchange process has been canceled.
error_api_connection: Error connecting to the server. Please try again in a few moments.
error_getting_rate: Error fetching the exchange rate. Please try again.
error_amount_out_of_range: The entered amount is outside the allowed range ({min_amount} to {max_amount}). Please try again.
error_invalid_amount: Invalid amount entered. Please enter only numbers.
error_creating_transaction: An error occurred while creating the transaction. Please contact support.
error_order_not_found: The requested order was not found.
order_details_format: Order Details #{id} Status: {status} Date Created: {created_at} You Sent: {from_amount} {from_currency} You Received (Est.): {to_amount_estimated} {to_currency} Your Wallet Address (Recipient): {recipient_address} Deposit Address (Exchange): {deposit_address}
add_address_select_currency: This address is for which cryptocurrency? Please select one.
add_address_enter_address: Great. Now, please send the full wallet address for {currency}.
add_address_enter_name: Perfect! Finally, enter a short, descriptive name for this address (e.g., My Main Wallet).
add_address_canceled: The process of adding an address has been canceled.
error_invalid_address: The entered address does not seem valid. Please try again.
support_menu_title:
🤝 Support Section

How can we help you?
support_select_topic: Please select the topic of your ticket:
support_enter_message: Please describe your issue in detail. If applicable, include the order or transaction ID.
support_ticket_created: ✅ Your ticket #{ticket_id} has been successfully created. Our experts will respond shortly.
support_no_tickets: You have not created any tickets yet.
error_not_authorized: You are not authorized to access this section.
admin_no_open_tickets: There are no open tickets requiring a response.
admin_reply_prompt: Please send your reply to the user. This message will be sent directly to them.
admin_reply_sent_success: ✅ Your reply has been successfully sent to the user.
admin_enter_user_id_prompt: Please send the numeric ID of the user you want to find.
admin_user_not_found: No user was found with this ID.
error_invalid_user_id: Invalid ID entered. Please send numbers only.
admin_broadcast_prompt: Please send the message you want to broadcast to all users. It can be text, a photo, a video, or any other format.
admin_broadcast_confirm_prompt: This message will be sent to {user_count} users. Do you confirm?
admin_broadcast_sending: ✅ Send command issued. The broadcast process has started in the background. A report will be sent to you upon completion.
error_broadcast_expired: Error: The message data has expired. Please try again.
broadcast_started: 🚀 Broadcast process for {user_count} users has started...
enter_new_markup: Please enter the new markup value in percentage (e.g., 0.5). The number must be between 0 and 100.
error_invalid_markup: Invalid value entered. Please enter a number between 0 and 100.
exchange_enter_amount_simple: Please enter the amount of {from_currency} you wish to sell.
exchange_preview_details: Transaction Preview: 📤 **You Send:** {amount} {from_currency} 📥 **You Get (Estimated):** {estimated_amount} {to_currency} This rate is valid for a short period. Do you confirm this exchange rate?
user_notification_new_reply: 💬 A new reply has been posted for your ticket #{ticket_id}.
error_rate_unavailable: Unfortunately, it's not possible to calculate the exchange rate for this pair at the moment. Please choose another currency or try again later.
generic_error_message: An unexpected error occurred. This has been reported to support. Please try again.
error_no_rate_found: Unfortunately, an exchange rate for this pair is not available at the moment. Please try another pair.
search_prompt: Please enter the name or ticker of the desired currency:
no_currency_found: No currency found with these details. Please try again.
error_no_rate_found: Unfortunately, an exchange rate for this pair is not available at the moment. Please try another pair.
select_network_prompt: Please select the desired network for {currency}:
